  • [ - ] Zoltan - member since 15-Feb-20

    This is what happens when the better team (Brazil) is not scared to death from his opponent (Brazil in all of their earlier games in this WC). Free flowing game, everything is fluid, impossible to stop because the Korean defence simply has no time to stop the Brazilian attackers. Too bad that these type of games just come about by chance, rather than by shear confidence and coaching acumen (coaching acumen because it is well known that fear hinders performance and favours the weaker team). P.S. I cannot help but laugh about the media droids who pretend like this type of Brazil was present throughout the WC - they never draw any conclusions just praise anything they see: whether garbage or a great game such as today LOL.
